bullets.text: Designed and delivered production-ready AI/ML solutions using aws, azure, docker, fastapi, genai.
Built scalable APIs and workflows using aws, azure, docker, fastapi, genai to support real-world deployments.
Implemented MLOps practices for reproducibility and tracking using aws, azure, docker, fastapi, genai.

cover_letter.subject: Application for the role
paragraphs: Hello Hiring Team, I’m applying for the role. My background aligns strongly with the role’s needs, particularly in aws, azure, docker, fastapi, genai, kubernetes.
I focus on building production-grade systems: clean APIs, reliable pipelines, and measurable outcomes. I value traceability, safety, and governance in AI delivery.
If helpful, I can share examples of end-to-end work covering design, implementation, testing, and deployment. Thank you for your time and consideration.

qa_stubs.Why are you a fit for this role?: My experience in aws, azure, docker, fastapi, genai, kubernetes matches the role requirements, and I build production-ready systems with strong engineering discipline.
qa_stubs.What are your strongest skills?: aws, azure, docker, fastapi, genai, kubernetes, langchain, langgraph
